category_slot_item_label: In category "{category_label}", under subcategory "{subcategory_label}", what item is listed {slot_ordinal}?
Find "{category_label}" and then "{subcategory_label}". What is the {slot_ordinal} item in that block?
Read the {slot_ordinal} item under "{subcategory_label}" within category "{category_label}".
Within "{category_label}", what item appears {slot_ordinal} in the "{subcategory_label}" section?
Using the "{subcategory_label}" block in category "{category_label}", what is the {slot_ordinal} visible item?
category_item_count: How many items are listed under subcategory "{subcategory_label}" within category "{category_label}"?
Find "{category_label}" and then "{subcategory_label}". How many item rows are in that block?
Count the visible items in the "{subcategory_label}" section of category "{category_label}".
Within category "{category_label}", how many items appear under "{subcategory_label}"?
Using the category grid, what is the item count for "{subcategory_label}" under "{category_label}"?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

query:category_slot_item_label.object_description: a category grid page with category headers, subcategory headers, and short item rows
query:category_slot_item_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible item label requested by the question
query:category_slot_item_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "category_header", "subcategory_header", and "target_item", each mapped to a [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates

query:category_item_count.object_description: a category grid page with category headers, subcategory headers, and short item rows
query:category_item_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of visible item rows in the requested block
query:category_item_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around the counted item rows
